statement: In every magma, Equation 1142 (`x = y * ((y * (z * w)) * y)`) implies Equation 3560 (`x * y = y * ((y * y) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0075
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op z w)) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op y (op (op y y) z))
